spec.query:
from(bucket: "pihole")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "top_permitted_domains")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["alias"] == "$alias")
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: ["_time"], mode:"by")
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field", "alias"])
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "pihole")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "top_blocked_domains")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["alias"] == "$alias")
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: ["_time"], mode:"by")
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field", "alias"])
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "pihole")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "top_clients")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["alias"] == "$alias")
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: ["_time"], mode:"by")
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field", "alias"])
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "pihole")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "upstreams")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["alias"] == "$alias")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "pihole")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "query_types")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["alias"] == "$alias")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "pihole")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "history")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total" or r["_field"] == "forwarded" or r["_field"] == "cached" or r["_field"] == "blocked")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["alias"] == "$alias")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "pihole")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "blocking")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "blocking")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["alias"] == "$alias")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "pihole")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "queries")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["alias"] == "$alias")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "pihole")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "queries")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "blocked")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["alias"] == "$alias")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "pihole")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "queries")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "percent_blocked")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["alias"] == "$alias")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "pihole")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "gravity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "domains_being_blocked")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["alias"] == "$alias")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
